title: UCSL – Apprentices – 20 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UCSL ApprenticesRecruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Graduate, Technician, Trade Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) Recruitment 2026 for 20 posts of Graduate/Technician (Diploma), ITI Trade Apprentices. Candidates with Diploma, B.E/B.Tech, ITI Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 18-05-2026, and closes on 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UCSL official website udupicsl.com.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology or Diploma in Engineering/Technology

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited Mechanical Engineering (Graduate)
